title: Trace Evasion
story: You are inside the Grid. Eyes everywhere. Search (/) finds anything instantly — n hops to the next hit before the trace locks on.

challenges.intro: Locate the backdoor before the trace completes.
buffer: a backdoor hides in the stream

challenges.intro: Three nodes share a signature. Hop matches until you reach node3.
challenges.hint: Search /node then press n to jump to the next match.
